recent_form_summary: Strong recent form: 3-0 in Berlin qualifying, beat Masarova 6-2 6-4, then lost a tight R16 to Pegula 6-2 6-4 (4 aces in that match).
stat_trend_summary: Low season ace rate (~1.35/match, return-first doubles specialist), but hit 4 aces in her one confirmed recent box score, and grass tends to lift ace counts tour-wide.
opponent_factor_summary: Samsonova is a big hitter but not an elite returner and is currently out of form, which may allow more free points than usual.
injury_news: 2026 injury history (Indian Wells retirement, Madrid knee tweak) but no current limitation; played 4 matches in Berlin with no issue.
notes: Only one confirmed match value (4 aces vs Pegula) sits right at the line; grass tends to boost aces tour-wide and a contested 3-setter would push this higher via extra service games.
